NCC NCC in Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT) National Cadet Corps is one of the biggest youth forum which brings the vibrant students together and guides them in a proper direction so that they can play a constructive role in the development of the country. Jaypee University of Information technology has taken a step and started the NCC Unit to train its students so that they become a responsible citizen of the country. University has NCC Army Unit for Boys and Girls under the affiliation of 1 HP Bn, Solan. We have half a Battalion of 80 cadets each for Boys and girls under Punjab Haryana Himachal Pradesh Chandigarh Directorate. The vacancies of Senior Division (Boys) is Regular at JUIT since 2025. The mission and vision of our NCC Unit is to create awareness among the student community regarding its importance towards nation building. University strongly supports NCC training both financially and morally at the campus. While pursuing the course, NCC cadets undergo different training programs such as Drill, Shooting, Physical fitness, map reading, First aid and camp training covering basic military training in the Army. In keeping with NCC's motto of "unity and discipline", JUIT is dedicated to providing character and a dynamic approach to our students throughout their university education. Lt.(Dr.)Pragya Gupta, Associate NCC Officer(ANO), Assistant Professor, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan. She got commissioned as Lieutenant from Officers training academy, Gwalior in October 2019.
